title: types: ChatContactSetInput, ChatContactQueryInput
description:
What: Add ChatContactSetInput and ChatContactQueryInput to methods/mod.rs.

Algorithm:
1. ChatContactSetInput<'a> after SpaceBanCreateInput / before AddMemberInput group:
   id: &'a str (which contact to update)
   blocked: Option<bool>
   display_name: Option<Option<&'a str>> (Some(None)=clear, Some(Some(s))=set, None=omit)
   No Default; doc comment explains Option<Option> pattern.
2. ChatContactQueryInput<'a> with #[derive(Debug, Default)]:
   filter_blocked: Option<bool>
   filter_presence: Option<&'a str>
   position: Option<u64>
   limit: Option<u64>
   sort_property: Option<&'a str>  -- 'lastSeenAt'|'login'|'lastActiveAt'
   sort_ascending: Option<bool>

Run cargo fmt, clippy -D warnings, cargo test. Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; ChatContactSetInput and ChatContactQueryInput in mod.rs; clippy clean
close_reason: ChatContactSetInput and ChatContactQueryInput added to mod.rs
